title: Quran, Sura 92: Al-Layl
description: Sura 92 (Al-Layl: The Night) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 92 (Al-Layl: The Night) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the night when it covers, and the day when it appears in brightness, and He who created the male and female — indeed, your efforts are diverse.
